prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为1278→942→1655→1429→1935名，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字增大），近3年累计后移约500名；2025年基准约1935名，为近5 年最高位次；该校在广东省物理类招生计划2021年25人，2022–2025年均为26人，2026年计划仍为26人，连续5年持平，无扩招或缩招信号，对竞争格局无 直接影响。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；复旦大学（含医学院）软科主榜2026年排名第5，属全国顶尖层次，对高分考生有持续强吸引力；复旦大学（含医学院）拥有临床 医学A、公共卫生与预防医学A+、药学A、护理学A-、生物学A+等一批顶尖学科，与招生专业（临床医学、口腔医学、基础医学、预防医学、药学）高度对应，学科实力全国顶尖， 对考生有强吸引力；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风与学校管理事件；但抖音综合热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量极大；历史投档异常方面，2022年河南投档线暴跌曾引 发中关注，2023年亦有高关注记录，但近两年未见明显断档信号。声誉偏负面与抖音高热形成对冲，整体报考关注度仍处高位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学2024年热度评估为推荐（偏热），口腔医学为推荐（偏热），医学类专业整体持续高热；广东省物理类考生数从2025年440, 208增至2026年456,000（+3.59%），考生规模扩大加剧竞争；复旦大学上海医学院位于上海市，非广东省本地，但上海作 为一线城市对广东考生有较强吸引力；该校在广东招生计划稳定，无地域偏好显著变化。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动上升趋势、2026年广东省物理类考生增加约3.59%、 招生计划持平、医学专业热度持续高位等因素，预计2026年竞争较2025年进一步加剧，位次数字小幅上移；预测最低位次约1975名，区间1750–2200名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 临床医学（正谊明道班）（8年制）
- 口腔医学（拔尖班）（5年制）
- 临床医学（卓越临床医师班）（5年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 口腔医学（含卓越口腔医师班）（5年制）
- 基础医学（尚医拔尖班）（5年制）
- 药学（含药学拔尖班、药学产教融合班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 预防医学（5年制）
- 基础医学（5年制）
- 药学（普通班）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约1975名，区间1750–2200名。位次在区间下限（1750名以内）可重点冲刺一档的临床医学（正谊明道班）和口腔医学（拔尖班）；位次在区间中段（约1975名）建议以 二档的口腔医学、基础医学（尚医拔尖班）和药学为主；位次在区间上限（2200名附近）可考虑三档的预防医学和基础医学作为保底。该校医学学科实力顶尖，各专业均有强学科 支撑，建议结合个人兴趣和职业规划选择。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 1278 → 942 → 1655 → 1429 → 1935, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers increasing), with a cumulative shift of about 500 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 1935, the highest ranking in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Guangdong Province was 25 in 2021, 26 from 2022 to 2025, and remains 26 in 2026, stable for 5 consecutive years, with no signals of expansion or contraction, having no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; Fudan University (including its medical college) ranks 5th on the Soft Science main list in 2026, belonging to the national top tier, with a sustained strong attraction for high-scoring students; Fudan University (including its medical college) has a number of top-tier disciplines such as Clinical Medicine A, Public Health and Preventive Medicine A+, Pharmacy A, Nursing A-, Biology A+, which highly correspond to its enrollment majors (Clinical Medicine, Stomatology, Basic Medicine, Preventive Medicine, Pharmacy), with national top-tier disciplinary strength, strongly attracting candidates; the reputation evaluation during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle is somewhat negative, involving incidents of teacher ethics and school management; however, its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranks 4th (high heat), with extremely high short video exposure; regarding historical admission anomalies, the 2022 Henan admission line plummet caused moderate attention, and there were also high-attention records in 2023, but no obvious signal of a cutoff in the past two years. The negative reputation and high Douyin popularity offset each other, keeping overall application attention at a high level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, the popularity assessment for Clinical Medicine is recommended (slightly hot), Stomatology is recommended (slightly hot), and medical majors overall remain consistently hot; the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province increased from 440,208 in 2025 to 456,000 in 2026 (+3.59%), with the expansion of the candidate pool intensifying competition; Fudan University Shanghai Medical College is located in Shanghai, not local to Guangdong, but as a first-tier city, Shanghai has a strong attraction for Guangdong candidates; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong is stable, with no significant changes in regional preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating upward trend of historical rankings, the approximately 3.59% increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province in 2026, the stable enrollment plan, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is expected that competition in 2026 will further intensify compared to 2025, with ranking numbers slightly increasing; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 1975, with a range of 1750–2200.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (Zhengyi Mingdao Class) (8-year program)
- Stomatology (Top Talent Class) (5-year program)
- Clinical Medicine (Outstanding Clinical Physician Class) (5-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Stomatology (including Outstanding Stomatologist Class) (5-year program)
- Basic Medicine (Shangyi Top Talent Class) (5-year program)
- Pharmacy (including Pharmacy Top Talent Class, Pharmacy Industry-Education Integration Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Preventive Medicine (5-year program)
- Basic Medicine (5-year program)
- Pharmacy (Regular Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 1975, range 1750–2200. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 1750) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 Clinical Medicine (Zhengyi Mingdao Class) and Stomatology (Top Talent Class); candidates with rankings in the middle of the range (approximately 1975) are advised to primarily consider Tier 2 Stomatology, Basic Medicine (Shangyi Top Talent Class), and Pharmacy; candidates with rankings near the upper end of the range (around 2200) can consider Tier 3 Preventive Medicine and Basic Medicine as safety options. The university's medical disciplines are top-tier, with strong disciplinary support for each major; it is recommended to choose based on personal interests and career plans.
